title: Adjust copy destination for linked tar files in ADD
body:
When we are given a linked tar file as a source file, we were setting the
destination to the original destination plus the name of the link.
This created a directory using the links name and then everything from the tar file was
copied under that directory.  The link name should not be used as part
of the directory structure.

Fixes: #2102

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: Hmm, looks like I broke a different test with this change, will run it down early next week.
